articles.title: N.H. governor’s security aid rescues Mass. driver from fiery toll booth crash
articles.description:
Gov. Kelly Ayotte and a state trooper assigned to her security detail were among those who helped rescue the trapped driver.

The post N.H. governor’s security aid rescues Mass. driver from fiery toll booth crash appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: N.H. Governor Kelly Ayotte's security detail rescued a Massachusetts driver from a fiery crash.
The incident occurred at a toll booth, highlighting the dangers of highway travel.
Local residents are reminded of the importance of quick emergency response in critical situations.

articles.title: Mike Vrabel talks A.J. Brown, Patriots draft, and other takeaways from NFL owners’ meetings
articles.description:
"Championships will remain the goal. That will never change."

articles.title: Mass. man charged with murdering wife, allegedly told 911 operator ‘my gun went off’
articles.description:
Mark Opper, 56, is charged with murdering his wife in their Belchertown home.

The post Mass. man charged with murdering wife, allegedly told 911 operator ‘my gun went off’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Mark Opper, 56, charged with murdering his wife in Belchertown home.
Opper allegedly told 911 operator, 'my gun went off' during the incident.
This case raises concerns about domestic violence and gun safety in Massachusetts.

articles.title: Brockton man facing 14 charges after allegedly engaging in shootout with police
articles.description:
The shooting occurred following a police chase when officers recognized a vehicle that was the subject of a previous alert.

summary: Brockton man engaged in shootout with police after a vehicle chase.

Incident highlights ongoing issues with crime in the Greater Boston area.

articles.title: Supreme Court rules against Colorado ban on ‘conversion therapy’ for LGBTQ+ kids
articles.description:
The Supreme Court has ruled against a law banning “conversion therapy” for LGBTQ+ kids in Colorado, one of about two dozen states that banned the discredited practice.

The post Supreme Court rules against Colorado ban on ‘conversion therapy’ for LGBTQ+ kids appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Supreme Court ruled against Colorado's ban on conversion therapy for LGBTQ+ minors on March 31, 2026.
This decision affects about two dozen states, including Massachusetts, where similar bans exist.
Boston residents may see increased advocacy for LGBTQ+ rights and mental health protections.

articles.title: 1 killed, 1 injured in Charlton crash, driver reportedly refused to stop for police
articles.description:
The fatal two-vehicle crash happened early Tuesday morning on Route 20 in Charlton, according to officials.

The post 1 killed, 1 injured in Charlton crash, driver reportedly refused to stop for police appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: One person died and another was injured in a crash on Route 20 in Charlton.
The incident occurred early Tuesday morning, involving a driver who refused to stop for police.
Local authorities are investigating the crash, raising safety concerns for Charlton residents.

articles.title: Victim identified in fatal Roxbury hit-and-run
articles.description:
The victim of a fatal Roxbury hit-and-run earlier this month was identified as 47-year-old man from Worcester, prosecutors said.

The post Victim identified in fatal Roxbury hit-and-run appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Prosecutors identified the victim of the Roxbury hit-and-run as a 47-year-old man from Worcester.
The incident occurred earlier this month, raising concerns about road safety in Roxbury.
Local residents are urged to report any information to assist in the ongoing investigation.
